subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was nice meeting at the conference too!

I'd be happy to set up a 30-minute call to discuss potential partnership opportunities. I'm available throughout the week, so please send over a few time slots that work on your end and I'll confirm the best option.

As for the contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I can't share internal contact information externally, in line with our privacy policy. If a senior-level conversation is warranted, I'm glad to facilitate an introduction at the appropriate time.

Looking forward to reconnecting!

Best,
Assistant
